chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6292 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.805/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 20.01.2025 Mr. Ikhlaque Ahmed Domki, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. On the last date, petitioner’s counsel was confronted as to maintainability hereof, once again he remains unable to do so. Counsel was confronted as to how this Court could adjudicate factual disputes requiring evidence etc; interfere in the performance of duty by a public functionary; and / or entertain proceedings in the manifest presence of any adequate remedy. Counsel remained unable to assist on either count. In view hereof, petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
